Industry Collaborations

The Secure Systems Lab actively collaborates with industry partners to address real-world challenges in software engineering, cybersecurity, AI-assisted development, smart contracts, and software quality assurance.

Our collaborations focus on transforming research outcomes into practical tools, methodologies, and technologies that provide measurable industrial impact.

Featured Collaborations

TechSecure Solutions

TechSecure Solutions develops cybersecurity platforms for enterprise infrastructure and cloud-native applications.

We collaborated on AI-assisted vulnerability detection and automated software quality analysis for large-scale distributed systems.

The collaboration helped improve bug triaging efficiency and supported earlier detection of security vulnerabilities during development.

AI

Cybersecurity

Static Analysis

Software Quality



Company Website

EmbeddedAI Systems

EmbeddedAI Systems develops intelligent embedded software solutions for industrial automation and IoT devices.

Our research focused on predictive bug detection and reliability analysis for embedded control software.

The collaboration supported more reliable release cycles and reduced debugging effort for critical components.

Embedded Systems

AI

Reliability Engineering



Company Website

Full List of Collaborations

TechSecure Solutions

TechSecure Solutions develops cybersecurity platforms for enterprise infrastructure and cloud-native applications.

Collaboration focus:
We collaborated on AI-assisted vulnerability detection and automated software quality analysis for large-scale distributed systems.

Impact:
The collaboration helped improve bug triaging efficiency and supported earlier detection of security vulnerabilities during development.

Company Website



EmbeddedAI Systems

EmbeddedAI Systems develops intelligent embedded software solutions for industrial automation and IoT devices.

Collaboration focus:
Our research focused on predictive bug detection and reliability analysis for embedded control software.

Impact:
The collaboration supported more reliable release cycles and reduced debugging effort for critical components.

Company Website



Interested in collaborating?

We welcome collaborations with companies and organizations interested in:

  • AI-assisted software engineering
  • Software quality and reliability
  • Vulnerability detection
  • Smart contract security
  • Embedded systems
  • Mining software repositories
  • Software analytics

We collaborate through

  • Joint research projects
  • Industrial PhD programs
  • Internship supervision
  • Software analysis consulting
  • Joint funding applications
  • Open-source collaboration

Please contact us if you are interested in research partnerships, student internships, or technology transfer activities.
